data.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s Warren Buffett caught up in the trade war, what did he really say about Trump tariffs?
data.description:
Berkshire Hathaway chair Warren Buffett found himself at the center of a political controversy after US President Donald Trump shared a video on Truth Social claiming he supported Trump’s recent tariff policies. The video suggested that Trump’s tariffs would force the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, making stocks more accessible to middle-class Americans. According […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffett-in-the-trump-tariff-trade-war/

data.title: Bitcoin surpasses silver to become the ninth largest asset in the world
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News 8marketcap latest data shows that due to the continued decline in silver prices, its market value in global assets has been surpassed by Bitcoin. The current market value of silver is about 1.662 trillion US dollars, with a 24-hour drop of 7.65%, ranking 10th in the global asset market value, and Bitcoin has surpassed it to 9th place.

data.title: Ave.ai officially launches Ave Cloud at the 2025 Chain Ecosystem Carnival
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On April 5, Ave.ai, a leading on-chain aggregation trading platform, announced the official launch of Ave Cloud (API 2.0) at the "2025 On-Chain Ecosystem Carnival".
Ave Cloud (cloud.ave.ai) includes two types of API modules: data API and transaction API, which are designed to serve on-chain business developers, including free and paid service modes.
Ave data API is built based on Ave's full data, integrating 130+ public chains, 300+ DEX, 10+ LaunchPad, 10M+ Token data, and supporting more than 40 on-chain data dimensions.
Ave transaction API has performance advantages such as MEV protection, low gas, security and extremely fast matching, supports strategy customization and modular development, and helps quantitative trading, automated strategy execution and the rapid construction of diversified trading products.
"Through an open strategy, Ave will link and support more on-chain developers, support them in building a one-stop service from market data to trading orders, and jointly expand the on-chain ecosystem." Ave's relevant person in charge said.

data.title: Deribit: A user sold 100 BTC in total for $90,000 in BTC call and put options at the end of December
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LinChen, head of Asia Pacific business at Deribit, posted on the X platform that today’s largest BTC option transaction was a user who sold a $90,000 Bitcoin call option and a $90,000 Bitcoin put option at the end of December, totaling 100 BTC, earning $1.565 million in premiums, with a profit range of $84,000 to $104,000 at maturity, and an annualized return of about 24.5% in coin standard. Short volatility.

data.title: Deribit: A user sold ETH put and call options at $1,800 at the end of May, totaling 750 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lin Chen, head of Asia-Pacific business at Deribit, posted on the X platform that today’s largest ETH bulk option transaction was a user who bought a $1,800 put option and a $1,800 call option at the end of May, totaling 750 ETH, with a total income of $275,400.

data.title: 21Shares: If BTC continues to decouple from Nasdaq, it may be favored by institutional investors avoiding US stocks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Nasdaq index fell another 5% during Friday's intraday trading after a 6% plunge on Thursday, but the price of Bitcoin has remained around $83,000, outperforming crypto-related stocks such as Coinbase and Strategy.
David Hernandez, a crypto investment expert at digital asset management company 21Shares, said that Bitcoin has shown impressive resilience and quickly rebounded after a brief drop below $82,000, consolidating its position as a hedging tool during periods of macroeconomic stress. If this decoupling continues, it may indicate that BTC will become increasingly popular with institutional investors seeking to avoid turbulent stock markets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: FTX to dismiss over $2.5 billion in claims related to KYC noncompliance
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News FTX disqualified nearly 400,000 customers from claiming due to users' failure to start verifying their identities before the March 3 deadline, which could result in up to $2.5 billion in claims being cancelled due to non-compliance with know-your-customer regulations.
According to documents filed by the Delaware Bankruptcy Court on April 2, 392,000 claims have been completely dismissed and deleted, involving up to 2,377 pages of content. Although the total amount of unverified claims was initially estimated to be approximately $1 billion, creditor representative Sunil Kavuri said the actual amount could exceed $2.5 billion, including $655 million in small claims and $1.9 billion in large claims. These cancelled claims are part of a total of $33.6 billion in disputed claims that FTX expects to dismiss. FTX said this process is critical to making up for the failures of previous management in user data collection and due diligence. (DL News)

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Reportedly Considering Resignation Over Tariff Disputes
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Besant is reportedly contemplating resignation due to dissatisfaction with the Trump administration's tariff policies. MSNBC host Stephanie Ruhle revealed on April 4 that Besant is frustrated with what he perceives as the administration's 'absurd' tariff calculations. During the 'Morning Joe' television program, Ruhle stated, 'My sources indicate that Besant behaves differently within the Trump administration. In terms of Trump's inner circle, Trump is neither close to Besant nor receptive to his advice.' Ruhle further mentioned, 'I've been told that he is seeking an exit strategy, possibly aiming for a position at the Federal Reserve. Over the past few days, he has been damaging his credibility and career in the market.' Besant has not yet commented on these reports.

data.title: Analyst Says Top-10 Altcoin Setting the Stage for a Big Crash, Outlines Path Forward for Bitcoin and Chainlink
data.description:
Crypto analyst and trader Ali Martinez is leaning bearish on one large-cap altcoin as he offers his outlook for Bitcoin (BTC) and the native token of the blockchain oracle Chainlink (LINK).
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/05/analyst-says-top-10-altcoin-setting-the-stage-for-a-big-crash-outlines-path-forward-for-bitcoin-and-chainlink/
